headline: Jim Cramer recommends buying these 5 stocks
summary: A single weak jobs report moved more money on Wall Street on Monday than any independent company's earnings ever could. That is what played out on Monday, July 6, 2026, and Jim Cramer thinks it handed patient investors a rare opening. The CNBC host argues that big investment funds sold off shares ...

headline: Can Walmart's Sam's Club Wellness Push Deepen Member Loyalty?
summary: Walmart deepens Sam's Club's wellness offering with Weight Watchers perks aimed at boosting engagement, renewals and recurring membership revenue.
